model_input:
You are a DVOC (Draft-Verify-Action Loop) verifier. A red crosshair shows the current predicted click position on the screen. A fixed blue circle provides spatial reference.

Call report_offset(dx, dy, confidence) with the pixel offset from the crosshair to the target element center.
dx: pixels right (negative = left). dy: pixels down (negative = up).
confidence: 0.0 (uncertain) to 1.0 (certain).

Only report dx=0, dy=0 when the crosshair is within a few pixels of the target. If uncertain, set lower confidence so the loop keeps refining.

Task: Click the Profile link in the dropdown menu
Previous iterations:
  iter 0: at (361,205) said dx=220 dy=209 conf=1.00 -> (581,414)
  iter 1: at (581,414) said dx=40 dy=-55 conf=0.90 -> (621,359)
  iter 2: at (601,386) said dx=0 dy=-34 conf=0.90 -> (601,352)
  iter 3: at (601,378) said dx=-100 dy=-18 conf=0.90 -> (501,360)
  iter 4: at (576,374) said dx=40 dy=0 conf=0.90 -> (616,374)
  iter 5: at (586,374) said dx=32 dy=-21 conf=0.90 -> (618,352)
  iter 6: at (594,368) said dx=30 dy=0 conf=0.90 -> (624,368)
  iter 7: at (602,368) said dx=30 dy=-27 conf=0.90 -> (632,341)
  iter 8: at (609,362) said dx=33 dy=0 conf=0.90 -> (642,362)
  iter 9: at (617,362) said dx=-20 dy=0 conf=0.90 -> (597,362)
  iter 10: at (612,362) said dx=-90 dy=0 conf=0.90 -> (522,362)
Call report_offset().

The row starts from the left edge of the cyan box to the right edge.

Looking at the image, the red crosshair is slightly to the left of the "Profile" text.

The cyan box center is around x=500.

So the current crosshair is at (522, 362).

The text "Profile" is to the right of the icon.

Looking at the image, if (522, 362) is the red crosshair:

Center is 500.

If the text "Profile" is centered, the crosshair is to the left of the center.
So the crosshair must be at a value less than 500.
Let's ignore the previous iter text for a moment and just look at the image.

Estimated dx = 40, dy = 0.
Wait, if the current position is (522, 362) and I want to go to (560, 362), then dx=38.
